description: The starfish library implements a data-centric pipeline for spatial transcriptomics, orchestrating the transformation of raw 5D image data into biological expression matrices through sequential stages of loading, image processing, feature detection, and spatial quantitation.

components.name: Experiment Orchestration & Data Access
components.description: Manages the high-level experiment structure, FOV indexing, and lazy-loading of image data from storage.

components.name: Experiment & FOV Orchestrator
components.description: Manages the high-level logical hierarchy (Experiment, Field of View, ImageStack) and provides the primary API for accessing spatially-aware data.

components.name: Experiment Builder & Serializer
components.description: Handles the transformation of raw image data into the standardized SpaceTx format, managing JSON manifests and tile layouts.

components.name: Data Provider & Tile Fetching Layer
components.description: Provides an abstraction layer for retrieving individual 2D image tiles, decoupling logical structure from physical storage.

components.name: Metadata Inference & Formatting Utility
components.description: Automates the discovery of dataset structures by parsing file naming conventions or metadata to map to logical axes.

components.name: Pipeline Execution Interface
components.description: The consumption layer where orchestrated experiment data is fed into image processing and spot detection algorithms.

components.name: Core Image Processing Engine
components.description: Manages the 5D ImageStack and provides the API for image-to-image operations like registration, deconvolution, and filtering.

components.name: 5D Data Orchestrator
components.description: The central hub of the engine that manages the ImageStack lifecycle. It provides the high-level API for data manipulation, coordinate tracking, and the execution of parallelized operations across the 5D tensor.

components.name: Spatial Data Ingestion & Parsing
components.description: Handles the translation of heterogeneous data sources (Numpy, SlicedImage, SpaceTx) into the internal 5D structure. It manages spatial cropping, tile-key mapping, and ensures that physical coordinates are preserved during ingestion.

components.name: Image Transformation Suite
components.description: A collection of modular image processing algorithms (filters, deconvolution, registration) that implement a uniform Strategy pattern. These components encapsulate the mathematical logic for enhancing or normalizing image data.

components.name: Feature Detection & Decoding
components.description: Extracts quantitative signal from processed images, identifying spots or decoding pixel-level signatures.

components.name: Spot Detection & Quantification
components.description: Implements computer vision strategies to identify candidate features in image stacks, locating local maxima and extracting physical attributes and multi-channel intensity profiles.

components.name: Pixel-Level Decoding & Feature Integration
components.description: Executes decoding logic at the pixel level for multiplexed assays, managing the transition from raw pixel classifications to integrated features and providing Xarray-backed data structures.

components.name: Trace Assembly & Validation
components.description: Orchestrates the assembly of traces from detected spots, ensures schema conformance, and resolves spatial overlaps between adjacent image tiles.

components.name: Spatial Quantitation & Expression
components.description: Translates raw intensities into biological insights by mapping signals to genetic barcodes and cell regions.

components.name: Morphology & Segmentation Engine
components.description: Responsible for the algorithmic identification of biological entities (cells, nuclei) from image data using segmentation strategies like watershed.

components.name: Spatial Mask Management
components.description: Manages data structures and I/O operations for spatial regions, converting between pixel-based label images and coordinate-aware binary masks.

components.name: Decoding & Barcode Mapping
components.description: Translates observed multi-channel spot intensities into specific gene targets using a predefined codebook and distance metrics.

components.name: Expression Quantitation & Visualization
components.description: Aggregates decoded spots and cellular assignments into the final ExpressionMatrix and provides tools for data export and visual inspection.

components_relations.relation: generates label images and segmentation results for
uses segmentation masks for overlay in

components.name: System Framework & Validation
components.description: Provides infrastructure including CLI routing, schema validation, and global configuration management.

components.name: Validation & Schema Enforcement
components.description: Ensures input datasets comply with the SpaceTx JSON schema and acts as a gatekeeper for data integrity.

components.name: Core Infrastructure & Configuration
components.description: Manages global state, environment settings, CLI routing, and configuration context for the library.

components.name: Algorithm Framework & Type System
components.description: Defines abstract base classes and primitive types to enforce the Strategy Pattern across the pipeline.

components.name: Diagnostic & Simulation Engine
components.description: Provides tools for framework verification, synthetic data generation, and visualization utilities.

components_relations.relation: Uses contracts to run simulations against
